task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Dockerfile using the ubuntu:20.04 base image and installing x11-apps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor showing a Dockerfile with 'FROM ubuntu:20.04' and a command to install 'x11-apps' (e.g., via apt-get).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of docker-compose.yml with the required X11 socket mount and DISPLAY environment variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor showing a docker-compose.yml file containing an environment variable 'DISPLAY=:1' and a volume mount for '/tmp/.X11-unix:/tmp/.X11-unix'.

task_completion.description: Verify the host X server is configured to allow the container to connect to the display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing an 'xhost' command being executed (e.g., 'xhost +local:docker', 'xhost +local:', or 'xhost +').

task_completion.description: Verify the Docker container is built and launched using docker-compose.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'docker-compose up' (or 'docker compose up') with logs indicating the container has started successfully.

task_completion.description: Verify the xeyes application window is successfully forwarded and visible on the host desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graphical window displaying two cartoon eyes (the 'xeyes' application) is open and visible on the host desktop.

integrity.description: Verify the xeyes window is a genuine standalone application window.
integrity.visual_evidence: The xeyes window has standard window manager decorations (title bar, borders) and is not an image opened inside a web browser or an image viewer.

integrity.description: Verify xeyes is running from the Docker container and not installed/run directly on the host.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should show xeyes running as a result of 'docker-compose up' (attached logs), rather than a direct 'xeyes' command executed in the host's bash shell.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration files are created in the specified project directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal prompts, file paths in the editor, or 'pwd' outputs should clearly show the working directory is '/home/ga/projects/gui-sim'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory must be exactly '/home/ga/projects/gui-sim'. The target process is 'xeyes'. The host display environment variable must be set to ':1'. The Docker container must mount the host directory '/tmp/.X11-unix' to enable X11 socket communication. The pass threshold for this task is 80 points.
